  "findings": [
    "Missing secondary bonding jumper for separately derived system (SDS).",
    "No effective ground-fault current path from transformer secondary to source enclosure or grounding electrode conductor."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Lock out and tag out the transformer circuit immediately.",
    "Install properly sized secondary bonding jumper per NEC 250.30(A)(1) and Table 250.102(C)(1).",
    "Verify all bonding connections are accessible and torqued before re-energizing."
  ],
  "rationale": "A missing secondary bonding jumper on a separately derived system violates NEC 250.30(A)(1) and creates a shock and fire hazard; the installation cannot be energized in this state.",

    "NEC 250.30(A)(1) System Bonding Jumper",
    "NEC 250.30(A)(2) Grounding Electrode Conductor",
    "NEC Table 250.102(C)(1)",

  ]
